creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
In the four package messages: 

> … Please ensure that all users requiring graphics …

– should, I believe, be: 

> … Please ensure that all users requiring hardware-accelerated graphics …


(Does anything else require clarification or correction?)

Thanks
